results.title: Full year trading ahead of market expectations
results.snippet: The Board now expects to report revenue of approximately £53 million and adjusted EBITDA of not less than £14.4 million for the year ending 28 February 2026, ahead of market consensus. Adjusted EBITDA margins are over 27% with recurring revenue making up approximately 80% of total revenues.

results.title: Financial Reports
results.snippet: This page provides access to AdvancedAdvT Limited's annual and half year financial reports, including the Half Year 2026 interim financial report.

results.title: AdvancedAdvT Lifts FY26 Outlook as Recurring Revenue and Margins Climb
results.snippet: AdvancedAdvT Limited reported that trading for the year to 28 February 2026 is ahead of market expectations, with revenue projected at about £53 million and adjusted EBITDA of at least £14.4 million. The group lifted adjusted EBITDA margins to over 27%, underpinned by roughly 80% recurring revenue.

results.title: AdvancedAdvT Limited (ADVT.L) analyst ratings, estimates ...
results.snippet: This page shows analyst estimates for AdvancedAdvT Limited (ADVT.L), including earnings, revenue projections, EPS, upgrades, and downgrades.

results.title: Full year trading ahead of market expectations
results.snippet: AdvancedAdvT Limited has announced a trading update for the year ending 28 February 2026, with full-year results expected to be ahead of market expectations.

results.title: Purchase of Own Shares
results.snippet: AdvancedAdvT Limited announced the purchase of 15,000 ordinary shares at 165.00 pence on 14 April 2026 under its share buyback programme, bringing the cumulative total to 1,971,000 shares held in treasury.

results.title: AdvancedAdvT Limited - Investor - Regulatory News
results.snippet: This is the official investor page for AdvancedAdvT Limited providing regulatory news, stock information, financial reports and other shareholder resources for the AIM-listed company (ADVT).

results.title: Advancedadvt Regulatory News. Live ADVT RNS.
results.snippet: The page lists recent RNS announcements for ADVT including multiple Purchase of Own Shares updates from late March through mid-April 2026.

results.title: Purchase of Own Shares – Company Announcement - FT.com
results.snippet: AdvancedAdvT Limited reported further share purchases on 14 April 2026 as part of its buyback programme announced in March 2026, with the company focused on software solutions in business, healthcare and human capital sectors.

results.title: ADVANCEDADVT LIMITED ADVT Analysis - Stock
results.snippet: Stock analysis page for ADVANCEDADVT LIMITED detailing recent RNS news including a series of Purchase of Own Shares announcements dated between 26 March 2026 and 15 April 2026.

results.title: AdvancedAdvT Limited - Purchase of Own Shares
results.snippet: AdvancedAdvT Limited announced that on 01 April 2026 it purchased 150,000 of its ordinary shares at 164.88 pence per share as part of the share buyback programme announced on 4 March 2026. The shares will be held in treasury, bringing the cumulative total to 1,583,000 shares.

results.title: Share Buyback Programme and Return of Capital
results.snippet: AdvancedAdvT Limited announced its Share Buyback Programme and Return of Capital on 3 March 2026.

results.title: AdvancedAdvT Expands Share Buyback as Treasury Holdings Rise
results.snippet: AdvancedAdvT has repurchased another 15,000 shares at 165p, lifting total buybacks to nearly two million shares.

results.title: Purchase of Own Shares
results.snippet: AdvancedAdvT Limited purchased an additional 15,000 ordinary shares at 165.00 pence on 14 April 2026 as part of its buyback programme announced in March 2026. This brings the total shares bought to 1,971,000, held in treasury.

results.title: AdvancedAdvT Expands Share Buyback, Reducing Free-Float Voting Shares
results.snippet: AdvancedAdvT Limited continued its previously announced share buyback programme, repurchasing a further 136,000 ordinary shares on 31 March 2026.
